title: RequestContext
description: Optional request context included in events for reconciliation. Contains the request ID, idempotency key, API key prefix, origin, and actor type that triggered the event.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for the API request that triggered this event.

idempotency_key.description: The idempotency key from the originating request, if one was provided.

api_key_prefix.description: The prefix of the API key used (e.g. cdp_test_, cdp_live_). Never includes the secret portion.

origin.description: Origin of the request (e.g. api, sdk:typescript:0.1.0).

actor_type.description: Type of actor that made the request.
